pkg info graphics/mesa-dri
mesa-dri-18.3.2_3
Name           : mesa-dri
Version        : 18.3.2_3
Installed on   : Wed Jul 10 08:29:13 2019 CEST
Origin         : graphics/mesa-dri
Architecture   : FreeBSD:11:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : graphics
Licenses       : 
Maintainer     : x11@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://www.mesa3d.org/
Comment        : OpenGL hardware acceleration drivers for DRI2+
Options        :
	VAAPI          : off
	VDPAU          : off
	WAYLAND        : on
Shared Libs required:
	libX11.so.6
	libxshmfence.so.1
	libexpat.so.1
	libLLVM-8.so
	libxcb-xfixes.so.0
	libwayland-client.so.0
	libXv.so.1
	libdrm_intel.so.1
	libxcb-present.so.0
	libunwind.so.8
	libX11-xcb.so.1
	libdrm_amdgpu.so.1
	libdrm.so.2
	libxcb-sync.so.1
	libxcb-dri3.so.0
	libxcb-randr.so.0
	libxcb.so.1
	libglapi.so.0
	libxcb-dri2.so.0
	libXvMC.so.1
	libdrm_radeon.so.1
Shared Libs provided:
	libvulkan_radeon.so
	libXvMCgallium.so.1
	libvulkan_intel.so
Annotations    :
	FreeBSD_version: 1102000
	repo_type      : binary
	repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 29.2MiB
Description    :
This package contains the current stable release of the client drivers for DRI2+

With a X Server configured for DRI, they allow direct rendering of hardware-
accelerated OpenGL. This package also includes the software renderer, either
llvmpipe or classic SWrast.

WWW: http://www.mesa3d.org/
